name: octo
description: GitHub + CI/CD workflow toolkit for developers: repo init, issue → PR → merge, and scaffolding the issue-driven templates/workflows into any repo. /octo:init bootstraps a repo; create-issue + /octo:create-pr open work; /octo:merge lands a reviewed PR; /octo:setup scaffolds templates and optional Actions; /octo:whoami + /octo:config check and set up your git + GitHub identity.
